LanguageData.Ammo_45Schofield_FMJ.label: .45 Schofield (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_45Schofield_FMJ.description: Old school revolver cartridge designed for the frontier, very similar to the longer .45 Colt.
LanguageData.Ammo_45Schofield_AP.label: .45 Schofield (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_45Schofield_AP.description: Old school revolver cartridge designed for the frontier, very similar to the longer .45 Colt.
LanguageData.Ammo_45Schofield_HP.label: .45 Schofield (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_45Schofield_HP.description: Old school revolver cartridge designed for the frontier, very similar to the longer .45 Colt.
LanguageData.Bullet_45Schofield_FMJ.label: .45 Schofield bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_45Schofield_AP.label: .45 Schofield bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_45Schofield_HP.label: .45 Schofield bullet (HP)
